provenance.scope: dynamic weight quantization only; NOT a full-integer deployment

asymmetric_requant_counterexample.detail: a=0.50199, b=0.50189<a; per-timestep scales 0.004/0.0038 with zero-points 0/0 dequantize to 0.500000/0.501600
asymmetric_requant_counterexample.implication: integer pipelines that requantize each timestep with independent scale/zero-point CAN create sign violations; deployment must use a single-scale accumulator (e.g. int32 Coulomb counter) for the SOC state
